tiers.footerHint: Changes are saved automatically and used by the Translate tab.
tiers.noneConfigured: No translation tiers configured. Open Settings → LLM & API Keys and add at least one endpoint.
nav.expertModeOn: Expert mode active — all options visible
flashcards.reqAddEpisode: Add at least one episode in Files & Output
flashcards.reqSubsAllEpisodes: Load the original subtitles for every episode
transcribe.blocked.selectFiles: Select an input file and a destination to enable transcription.
transcribe.blocked.noTiers: No transcription tiers configured. Set them up in Settings.
transcribe.blocked.missingModel:
A Whisper model is missing.
Check your API keys or download the local model in Settings.
transcribe.blocked.noEndpoint:
No transcription endpoint ready.
Check your API keys or download the local models.
transcribe.dropFileHere: Drop 1 audio or video file to transcribe
transcribe.dropFileHint: It will be set as the transcription input file
translate.selectProviderFirst: Select a provider before loading files.
translate.configureLlmFirst: Configure an LLM first in Settings > LLM.
translate.blocked.noTiers: Configure at least one translation tier in Settings > LLM & API Keys before starting.
translate.blocked.selectFiles: Select input and destination SRT files to enable translation.
translate.retryDesc: Run the translation again with the same files and settings
translate.newTranslationDesc: Reset and start a new translation
translate.resultNone: No subtitles were translated. Check your tiers and API keys, then retry.
settings.llmConfigIncompleteDescModel: Default model required. Choose one in Settings > LLM.
settings.llmConfigIncompleteDescKey: API key missing for the selected provider. Add it in Settings > LLM.
settings.llmConfigIncompleteDescCustomEm: LLM configuration incomplete. Check the custom provider in Settings > LLM.
transcribe.livePhrasesHint: Transcribed phrases will appear here in real time.
translate.accuracySpeedDesc: Choose the accuracy profile. Higher quality yields a better translation but takes more time.
translate.continuityDesc: Controls sentence flow by passing context between subtitle batches.
